LanguageData.VPEH_Hemosage.description: 血聖啟示將血原作為儀式燃料燃燒，將血液轉化為痛苦、犧牲和掠奪性的奇蹟。
LanguageData.VPEH_Hemosage.label: 血聖
LanguageData.VPEH_Hemosage.tooltip: 血賢者是透過血儀式和充滿詛咒的血原來提供啟示的神秘主義者。他們的儀式汲取活力，播下恐懼的種子，留下的只是惡夢。
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppeteer.description: 偶像傀儡師的揭露打破了思想，奴役了意志，並將空虛的受害者變成了神秘主義者的延伸。
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppeteer.label: 偶像傀儡師
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppeteer.lockedReason: 僅限帝國出生的神秘主義者
LanguageData.VPEP_Puppeteer.tooltip: 偶像傀儡師是佔有和精神支配的大師。他們掏空目標，戴著像面具一樣的木偶，並透過將自己傾注為一次性奴隸來維持生命。
LanguageData.VPE_Archon.description: 大祭司的啟示使一位領導者登基，他束縛追隨者，耗盡對手，並透過存在和痛苦來統治。
LanguageData.VPE_Archon.label: 大祭司
LanguageData.VPE_Archotechist.description: 黑站專家揭露了被禁止的機器思維、瘋狂和武器化的神經超載。
LanguageData.VPE_Archotechist.label: 黑點專家
LanguageData.VPE_Chronopath.description: 末日觀察者的啟示透過抓住時間的邊緣來扭曲年齡、成長和持續時間。
LanguageData.VPE_Chronopath.label: 末日觀察者
LanguageData.VPE_Conflagrator.description: 召喚者的啟示在壯觀的儀式中將火、熱和原始的破壞性能量武器化。
LanguageData.VPE_Conflagrator.label: 喚灰者
LanguageData.VPE_Empath.description: 催眠師的啟示可以安撫心靈，打破恐慌，讓附近的追隨者充滿不自然的平靜。
LanguageData.VPE_Empath.label: 催眠師
LanguageData.VPE_Frostshaper.description: Rimebinder 的啟示將寒冷、冰和熵塑造成屏障、陷阱和致命霜凍。
LanguageData.VPE_Frostshaper.label: 裡賓賓德
LanguageData.VPE_Harmonist.description: 織兆者的啟示用財富換取不幸，透過儀式賭博扭轉了事件的平衡。
LanguageData.VPE_Harmonist.label: 預兆編織者
LanguageData.VPE_Necropath.description: 喚墓者的啟示散播恐懼，利用屍體，並將死者拖回服務崗位。
LanguageData.VPE_Necropath.label: 喚墓者
LanguageData.VPE_Nightstalker.description: 夜行者的啟示獎勵伏擊、黑暗和在不自然的陰影的面紗下無聲處決。
LanguageData.VPE_Nightstalker.label: 夜行者
LanguageData.VPE_Protector.description: 守護者的啟示保護盟友，強化肉體，將研究者從致命的危險中拖出來。
LanguageData.VPE_Protector.label: 看門人
LanguageData.VPE_Skipmaster.description: 行者啟示在空間中撕開了短暫的洞，透過神秘的捷徑移動人和物體。
LanguageData.VPE_Skipmaster.label: 守門者
LanguageData.VPE_Staticlord.description: 風暴召喚者的啟示可以控制閃電、停電機械，並將天氣變成武器。
LanguageData.VPE_Staticlord.label: 風暴召喚者
LanguageData.VPE_Technomancer.description: 遺跡工程師的啟示喚醒了死氣沉沉的電路，賦予了廢棄的技術力量，並將神秘的洞察力融入了硬體。
LanguageData.VPE_Technomancer.label: 遺跡工程師
LanguageData.VPE_Warlord.description: 戰鬥媒介啟示是自私的戰爭儀式，可以增強反應能力、速度和殺戮本能。
LanguageData.VPE_Warlord.label: 戰鬥媒介
LanguageData.VPE_Wildspeaker.description: 圖騰言者的啟示召喚野獸、荊棘和神殿裡的荒野神靈來求生存和防禦。
LanguageData.VPE_Wildspeaker.label: 圖騰音箱
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronStealthField.description: 啟動機載折射場並短暫地使裝置幾乎無法看到。
LanguageData.RobCo_AssaultronStealthField.label: 隱身領域
LanguageData.RobCo_HeavyFlamer.description: 消耗儲存的凝固汽油彈來投射更長、更熱的燃燒彈。
LanguageData.RobCo_HeavyFlamer.label: 重型火焰噴射器
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeNukeThrow.description: Hurls a mini-nuke in a high arc.
LanguageData.RobCo_LibertyPrimeNukeThrow.label: 迷你核彈投擲
LanguageData.RobCo_LightFlamer.description: Expends a napalm charge to spray a close-range incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_LightFlamer.label: 輕型火焰噴射器
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronRocketSalvo.description: 發射三枚火箭彈飽和打擊。
LanguageData.RobCo_SecuritronRocketSalvo.label: 火箭齊射
LanguageData.RobCo_ExterminatorFlamer.description: 消耗一次費用來噴射遠距離燃燒彈。
LanguageData.RobCo_ExterminatorFlamer.label: 滅蟲火焰噴射器
LanguageData.RobCo_NapalmFlamer.description: Expends a napalm charge to spray an incendiary burst.
LanguageData.RobCo_NapalmFlamer.label: napalm flamer
LanguageData.WestTek_NightkinInvisibility.description: 觸發夜行者隱形力場並短暫地從視線中消失。
LanguageData.WestTek_NightkinInvisibility.label: 夜行者隱形
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowAcolyte.description: Commissions the Sergeant title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 13 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Sergeant or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowAcolyte.label: commission: sergeant
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowBaron.description: Commissions the Colonel title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 45 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Colonel or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowBaron.label: commission: colonel
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowCount.description: Commissions the General title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 45 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a General or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowCount.label: commission: general
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowFreeholder.description: Commissions the Member title on a selected pawn. That pawn receives 1 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Member or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowFreeholder.label: commission: member
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowKnight.description: Commissions the Lieutenant title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 21 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Lieutenant or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowKnight.label: commission: lieutenant
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowPraetor.description: Commissions the Captain title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 31 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Captain or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowPraetor.label: commission: captain
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowYeoman.description: Commissions the Private title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 7 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Private or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
LanguageData.VFEE_BestowYeoman.label: commission: private
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.description: is giving a presidential address from the dais. If all goes well, every ranked participant will gain a small amount of Votes, and they will gain Votes for each ranked participant. If it goes poorly, the speech will cause social strain and lose Votes for each ranked participant. The outcome depends on their social abilities. Whitespring officials currently in the area will join the address and count as ranked participants.
LanguageData.VFEE_RoyalAddress.label: presidential address
LanguageData.Speech.description: Initiate a presidential address from the presidential chair. All colonists will come and listen. If it goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for the speaker. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on the speaker's social abilities.
LanguageData.Speech.label: presidential address
